## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Kelvin Gitari for AI Content Manager role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kelvin has \~1 year freelance experience with GrowthX, using AirOps for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Strong familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Claude) for content generation/editing](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Demonstrated process improvements (e.g., template formatting) and client adaptability (RAMP)](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Role focuses on organic search content, requiring editorial skills and platform workflow mastery](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

## Topics

### Kelvin's GrowthX Experience

  - [\~1 year freelance content creation using AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Recent clients: RAMP (web page content), DataGrid (articles)](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Workflow refinement: Improved inputs led to more streamlined content](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Editing process: Uses client SOPs, keyword alignment, structure checks](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Adapts to evolving client needs (e.g., RAMP's changing page structure requirements)](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### AI and Editorial Approach

  - [Uses ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Claude for content generation and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Process: Generate content → check accuracy → ensure editing/publishing standards](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Keyword research: Analyzes client offerings, goals (e.g., customer acquisition, sales)](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - ["Definition of done": Meets client requirements, publishable quality](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Proactively improved templates to address formatting issues, streamlining workflow](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

### Background and Skills

  - [Freelance writing experience (blogs, web content, social media) via Upwork + direct clients](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Keyword research using tools like \[specific tool name omitted\]](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Adapts to client feedback, communicates directly with senior staff (e.g., Nika)](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

### GrowthX Role and Structure

  - [Focus: Organic search content, improving SEO and LLM prompt results](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Key traits: Attention to detail, project ownership, editorial mindset](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Platform proficiency: Ability to tweak workflows for optimal output](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Workload: Managing 2-3 clients/week, potential for scaling up](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Team structure: Content managers work in pods with managing editors and account strategists](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Reporting to Matthew Panzerino (Chief Content Officer)](https://fathom.video/share/keCYtceyGJZyQJVCY4uazNtPsZpfSyGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
